column10: ities vary as to which hardware to support in their schools. The Inner London Education Authority, for example, like many others, decided to standardise on the RML machines at primary and secondary level. There are obvious reasons for standardisation, as support systems can develop software and maintenance for all machines in the schools. Other authorities, such as Grampian Regional Council, chose to support the Spectrum at primary level.; Author
